titles.text: 幽 遊 白書 特別篇

descriptions.text: Yu Yu Hakusho: Tokubetsu Hen ("Yu Yu Hakusho: Special Edition") is a fighter game. Rather than controlling the character directly with the D-pad and buttons, the players charge attacks and unleash them at the right amount of power. Combat is depicted as a series of dramatic cutaways as each fighter launches their attacks and the other tries to defend or evade them.
